usage: compare_cellview [-help] [-ignore {pin_purpose}] [-log <report_file_name>] { {{-source {sourceLib sourceCell sourceView} -compare {compareLib compareCell compareView}} | {-lib <lib> -cell <cell> -view {sourceView compareView}}} }

options.name: -compare
options.description: {compareLib compareCell compareView} Specify the lib/cell/view to compare target design

options.name: -ignore
options.description: Specify list of attributes to be excluded from cell comparison

options.name: -log
options.description: Report file containing all the comparison detail

options.name: -source
options.description: {sourceLib sourceCell sourceView} Specify the lib/cell/view to compare source design

options.name: -view
options.description: Specify different view of same lib/cell
